source_pr.title: ddl: remove the unstable check
source_pr.body:
The `testCreateIndex` will use the system schema version to check the job's `SchemaVersion`. After finishing the normal index(idx_normal) there are still two cancelled jobs in the `DDLJobList`. And They can update the system schema version. So when `testCreateIndex` checks the job's `SchemaVersion`, the system schema may be updated by other canceled jobs. 
The `TestCleanJobs` will be removed after we initially support the parallel DDL. So now I remove the unstable check to fix it.

evidence: evidence: ddl: remove the unstable check
